goal: Add a local v0 release closeout runner that promotes a verified external real-adapter evidence bundle directory or tar.gz archive into canonical artifacts/review and immediately runs v0 release readiness verification, without changing bundle, M6, or v0 acceptance policy.
head: 99f7b7e
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a local closeout orchestration script for an externally supplied bundle directory/archive, focused tests, refreshed current NOT_GO v0 readiness, WORKING.md, and this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Closeout runner accepts either --bundle-dir or --bundle-archive and delegates to the existing strict bundle promotion verifier
Closeout runner runs v0 readiness after promotion and reports GO only when v0 readiness also verifies GO
Focused tests cover GO archive closeout, NOT_GO promotion refusal, and NOT_GO readiness after successful bundle promotion when M6 docs are not GO
Current local v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC and v0 remain NOT_GO until real trained CUDA adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.
This gate does not edit release review docs or verifier acceptance criteria.

phase_notes.plan: Add local closeout orchestration for externally supplied real-adapter evidence bundle archive/directory.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed archive production and promotion exist, but local promotion plus v0 readiness closeout is still a manual command sequence.
phase_notes.build: Created a runner that promotes a strict bundle source and then runs v0 readiness verification with explicit expected decision handling and root-relative bundle path resolution.
phase_notes.check: JSON contract, py_compile, focused pytest, rg evidence, v0 readiness expected NOT_GO, json.tool, m1-smoke bootstrap, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. The runner is ready for an externally supplied GO evidence bundle archive/directory; current local release readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole blocker.

pabcd.approved_scope: Local closeout runner for external bundle directory/archive, focused tests, refreshed current NOT_GO v0 readiness, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
